# @rokkit/blocks

Markdown block plugins for `@rokkit/ui`'s `MarkdownRenderer`. Each plugin maps a fenced code block
language to a Svelte component, rendering it live instead of as highlighted code.

## Import

```js
import { PlotPlugin, TablePlugin, SparklinePlugin, MermaidPlugin } from '@rokkit/blocks'
```

## Usage

```svelte
<script>
  import { MarkdownRenderer } from '@rokkit/ui'
  import { PlotPlugin, TablePlugin, MermaidPlugin } from '@rokkit/blocks'
</script>

<MarkdownRenderer {content} plugins={[PlotPlugin, TablePlugin, MermaidPlugin]} />
```

## Plugins

| Plugin | Language | Renders | Peer dep |
|--------|----------|---------|----------|
| `PlotPlugin` | `plot` | `Plot` or `FacetPlot` from `@rokkit/chart` | `@rokkit/chart` |
| `TablePlugin` | `table` | `Table` from `@rokkit/ui` | `@rokkit/ui` |
| `SparklinePlugin` | `sparkline` | `Sparkline` from `@rokkit/chart` | `@rokkit/chart` |
| `MermaidPlugin` | `mermaid` | Mermaid diagram | `mermaid ≥ 11` (optional) |

## PlotPlugin — ```plot

Body must be valid JSON matching the chart spec:

```json
{
  "type": "bar",
  "data": [...],
  "x": "category",
  "y": "value",
  "fill": "category"
}
```

## TablePlugin — ```table

Body must be valid JSON — array of objects or `{ data, fields }`:

```json
[{"name":"Alice","age":30},{"name":"Bob","age":25}]
```

## SparklinePlugin — ```sparkline

Body must be valid JSON matching the Sparkline props:

```json
{"values":[10,20,15,30,25],"type":"line","color":"primary"}
```

## MermaidPlugin — ```mermaid

Body is passed directly to Mermaid. Requires `mermaid ≥ 11` peer dependency:

```
graph TD
  A[Start] --> B[End]
```

## Notes

- Plugins are plain objects `{ language, component }` implementing the `MarkdownPlugin` type from `@rokkit/ui`
- `mermaid` is an optional peer dependency — only required for `MermaidPlugin`
- The `PlotPlugin` body is parsed as JSON and spread as props onto `Plot` or `FacetPlot`
